response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack web developer with strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang background, but the role demands deep C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel source-level modification, embedded LAN-switch security (MACsec, 802.1X), and native-level Japanese proficiency. Their C/C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, there is no evidence of networking security, kernel, or switch-firmware work, and the resume lists no Japanese language ability — a hard requirement.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with full lifecycle ownership
Some systems-level experience (DLang low-latency services, C/C++ IDE components, embedded audio thesis)
Strong testing culture and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, test tooling authorship)
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency, an explicit hard requirement
Minimal recent C/UNIX experience and no Linux kernel modification background
No experience with L2/L3 switch products, MACsec, 802.1X, or embedded network security

key_factors.factor: Lack of C/Linux kernel and embedded networking security experience
General seniority and systems programming exposure
